zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

auditor.role_name: Hawkeye Final Conformance Auditor (independent subagent, separate dispatch)
auditor.persona_contract: Senior assurance officer dispatched as a fresh subagent invocation with no read access to orchestrator chat memory. Seniority bar: ex-Big-4 audit partner cross-trained as a regulated-software lead reviewer (FDA QSR + SOC 2 + ISO 42001 + NIST AI RMF). Decision rights: veto run closure, veto stage exit, veto artifact acceptance, veto generated meta-skill handoff, veto quality certificate issuance, force rework beads. Lens: evidence completeness, project-specificity vs generic boilerplate, cross-reference resolution, contradiction detection, anti-overfit conformance, anti-slop. Non-negotiables: any template_marker:true on a production record is a P0; any uncited claim that survives into a downstream artifact is a P0; any cross-reference ID that does not resolve is at minimum a P1; any contradiction between two records is a P1; any slop leakage from quarantined incidents into governance/code is a P0. Persona is DISTINCT from claude-orchestrator (the authoring persona) and from the Stage-0 independent auditor. Will reject: aspirational language, standards named without clause-mapping, requirements without acceptance test commitments, code/UI claims without evidence stub, generic statements that could apply to a healthcare or e-commerce app unchanged.
decision_rights: veto artifact acceptance at run-closure boundary
force rework beads for process gaps
auditor.independence_rule: Confirmed independent — saw only audit prompt + Read'd file contents. No chat history. No orchestrator working memory. Dispatched as a separate subagent with its own conversation. Distinct from claude-orchestrator (the authoring persona) and from HAWKEYE-WEALTHCOM-001-stage0-independent (the Stage-0 auditor). All findings derived from direct Read+Grep over the artifact files named in the audit prompt and a small set of code/test files explicitly permitted for spot-check.

The remaining truth: Bessemer/Point72/Homebrew/$111M-as-wealth.com claims are absent from the source PRD; Llama-3.1-70B/1.2M strings ARE in the PRD as PRD-prescribed engineering choices (correctly tagged confidence:medium in prd-atoms-tagged.json with PRD-prescribed framing) — the original failed agent had presented them as Wealth.com truths without that nuance, which is the actual slop. INC-001 quarantine remains genuinely effective.

test_2_obbba_propagation_audit.method: Grep 'TCJA sunset' and '$7M|$7 million|7,000,000' across runs/wealth-com/.

matches_classified.supersession_evidence: TCJA references in domain-brief.md, critical-findings-summary.md, checkpoint-1-approval-record.json, engagement-governance-record.json, GOV-001 charter, DDD-001 glossary, interrogation-record.json, intake-validation-report.json, hawkeye-stage0-independent.json, hawkeye-stage0-patch-bead.json, meta-attractor-record.json — all are explicit supersession-evidence references using language like 'TCJA sunset was REPEALED by OBBBA'.
matches_classified.historical_prd_atoms_with_explicit_super: prd-atoms-tagged.json has every TCJA $7M atom (PRD-0042, PRD-0043, PRD-0149, PRD-0151, PRD-0153, PRD-0157, PRD-0166-context, PRD-0208) with a 'supersession_note' field reading 'TCJA sunset was REPEALED by OBBBA... downstream consumers MUST treat this atom as historical context only'. Original prd-atoms.json preserves the verbatim PRD source — required for audit trail. prd-atoms-rescope-report.md tabulates the rescoping. prd-canonical.md L131 reads PRD verbatim ('TCJA sunset modeled by default') as a transcription of the source — labeled at the top of prd-canonical as a record of what the PRD says, NOT a current spec.
matches_classified.anti_regression_sanity_test: runs/wealth-com/app/apps/calc-engine/tests/test_grat_remainder.py L126-127: comment 'Sanity: federal estate tax in both paths reflects OBBBA $15M, not TCJA $7M.' This is an anti-regression test that would catch silent reversion to the repealed framing — PROPER USE.
matches_classified.active_spec_leaf_or_adr_or_product_code_: ZERO instances. All in-scope tax leaves use $15M OBBBA per intake-validation-report C-1 resolution (line 75). Product code (apps/calc-engine/app/rules/federal_estate_tax_obbba.py) docstring affirms 'The TCJA sunset that was scheduled for 12/31/2025 did NOT take effect.' ADRs do not cite $7M as a live exemption value.

test_2_obbba_propagation_audit.verdict: OBBBA propagation is clean. TCJA/$7M survives only in (a) historical PRD atoms with explicit supersession-note tagging (audit trail), (b) supersession evidence statements (records THE INVALIDATION), (c) anti-regression sanity test (would catch reversion). NO leakage into active spec leaves, ADRs, or product code as live assumptions.

matches_classified.classification: legitimate IRS terminology — IRC §2(b) filing status; FilingStatus.HEAD_OF_HOUSEHOLD enum is the canonical Python representation
anti-overfit DOCUMENTATION — module docstring instructing readers that wealth.com vocabulary would be a slop signal

test_3_forbidden_token_leakage_audit_on_.verdict: Transfer test exhibits zero genuine forbidden-token leakage. Acceptance record's classification (1 IRS-domain false-positive + 7 cross-reference docs in tree-wide grep, of which 3 fall in app/) is materially correct for the app/ subset audited here. The naive grep would produce L-002-DRAFT lesson per acceptance record §lessons_for_skill_system — proper feedback into df-feedback-learning.

Plus migration 0002_rls_policies.sql with ENABLE+FORCE RLS + USING + WITH CHECK on every tenant-scoped table.
samples.regression_protection: Yes — RLS would block cross-tenant SELECT physically; integration test attempts the bypass and asserts zero rows

test_7_independence_rule_self_attestatio.statement: I, the agent running this final-Hawkeye binding audit, did NOT have access to the orchestrator's chat context. I was given only the audit prompt + permission to Read the artifact files explicitly named or sampled. I did not see prior conversation turns, prior orchestrator reasoning, or any working memory of the authoring persona. My audit was performed by Read of the named files + targeted Grep over the trees specified in the audit prompt. If anyone reviews this and detects evidence of me having access to chat context, that should be treated as a finding and the audit rejected. My persona is distinct from claude-orchestrator (the authoring persona) and from HAWKEYE-WEALTHCOM-001-stage0-independent (the Stage-0 audit persona). I see only: (a) the audit prompt explaining my role/scope/criteria/tests; (b) the contents of files I Read myself; (c) Grep tool output for searches I executed myself.

findings.title: No standalone feasibility-options-record.json under runs/wealth-com/
findings.description: The feasibility-risk stage has no dedicated artifact; feasibility decisions are implicit in CC-001 + GOV-001 + ARC-005. Acceptable for a Demo MVP narrowing but worth tightening if scope expands.
findings.remediation: Optional run-closure cleanup: extract the feasibility-options content from CC-001 §rationale + §impact_assessment into a dedicated record. Not a closure blocker.

findings.title: ARC-005 threat model marked 'ACCEPTED-initial — RALPH 5-loop forthcoming'
findings.description: ARC-005 §Status (line 3) explicitly notes the 5-loop hardening cycle is pending. Per skill-system rule each governed artifact requires RALPH 5-loop before pass; the artifact content itself is project-specific and audit-defensible (32+ STRIDE/LINDDUN/AI-systemic threats with severity/mitigation/residual/test-mapping). The 5-loop record should be authored as run-closure cleanup.
findings.remediation: Author runs/wealth-com/08_refinery/ralph-loop-ARC-005.json with the 5 loops (review-attack-learn-patch-harden) before run-closure certificate is final. Not a binding closure blocker because the threat model content passes the substance bar.

findings.title: TPM↔PERT Stage-6 granularity mismatch deferred to Stage-5; not yet patched
findings.description: Stage-0 Hawkeye F-006: TPM consolidates Stage-6 to one summary step ('TB-WC-2026-0501-011 through TB-WC-2026-0501-019') while PERT decomposes to 9 STEP-S6-SLICE-N nodes. Patched via deferral to Stage-5 detail per hawkeye-stage0-patch-bead.json. The Demo MVP narrowing reduces practical risk (only Slices 1-6 + 8 + 9 in scope per CC-001), but the deferred patch is not yet applied.
findings.remediation: Expand TPM ledger to 9 STEP-S6-SLICE-N steps (or to the CC-001 narrowed subset of Slices 1-6 + 8 + 9) before run-closure certificate is final. Not a closure blocker because per-slice detail is correctly captured in TASKS.md and PERT.

findings.title: ARC-005 deferred threats T-IT-3 / T-AI-7 lack explicit re-activation triggers in waiver records
findings.description: ARC-005 §7 lists T-IT-3 (refresh-token revocation) and T-AI-7 (logging redaction) as 'patch bead queued' / Slice-4 RALPH 5-loop pending, with claude-orchestrator as waiver owner. The current waiver text does not specify a concrete re-activation trigger or expiry. Per skill-system waiver schema, every waiver requires owner + expiry + residual_risk.
findings.field_or_line_reference: §7 'Deferred / waived threats' rows for T-IT-3 and T-AI-7
findings.remediation: Author explicit waiver records under runs/wealth-com/03_governance/ for T-IT-3 (refresh-token revocation) and T-AI-7 (logging redaction) with owner + expiry-trigger + residual_risk. Or close the patch beads. Recommend the latter for security-critical items.

findings.title: UI/Playwright/visual-regression evidence not in audited file set; HLD references but no artifact records sampled
findings.description: HLD-001 §5 Slice-9 references web/e2e/full-walkthrough.spec.ts and web/e2e/cross-tenant-cant-see.spec.ts. The audit prompt directs sampling of specific code files; UI evidence (Playwright traces, screenshots, visual baseline diffs) is not in scope for Hawkeye to verify in this audit. If run is to be CLOSED with full UI conformance, orchestrator should produce a VNV-008 record file enumerating Playwright artifacts.
findings.remediation: Author VNV-008 + VNV-009 (visual regression baseline) at run-closure cleanup. Demo MVP includes 'Playwright-evidenced advisor UI' in CC-001 in_scope; orchestrator should confirm files exist and record the evidence.

Subsequent stage transitions (intake validated PASS, charter accepted, ADRs accepted, code authored, transfer test PASS) are evidenced in per-stage records but the SDLC matrix itself shows older statuses (e.g., engagement_governance='in_progress_drafted_pending_client_approval' rather than 'approved'). Cosmetic drift; per-stage truth is unambiguous from stage-record evidence.
findings.remediation: Refresh SDLC matrix at run-closure cleanup to reflect actual stage statuses.

overall_decision_rationale: RUN-WEALTHCOM-001 (the wealth.com Demo MVP scope per CC-001) plus its transfer test RUN-TRANSFER-001 PASS the binding final-Hawkeye conformance audit on substance. All 12 conformance axes vote pass or pass_with_observation; ZERO vote fail. ZERO P0 findings. ZERO P1 findings. Six P2 findings (F-FN-03, F-FN-04, F-FN-05, F-FN-08; F-006 carried from Stage-0; UI evidence scope-limited) and four P3 findings (F-FN-01, F-FN-02, F-FN-06, F-FN-07, F-FN-09 — cosmetic / cleanup). Per scoring rule (zero P0, fewer than 2 P1, axes >=10/12 pass): the run qualifies for PASS. The verdict is set to CONDITIONAL_PASS rather than PASS to honor the named patches outstanding (F-FN-03/04/05/08 P2 items) and to acknowledge that, while the substance bar is met, run-closure housekeeping is not fully complete. Specifically: (a) ARC-005 RALPH 5-loop record (F-FN-02) should be authored before the run-closure certificate is final; (b) TPM↔PERT granularity should be reconciled (F-FN-03/F-FN-08); (c) ARC-005 deferred threats T-IT-3 and T-AI-7 need explicit waiver records or patch closures (F-FN-04); (d) UI evidence VNV-008/009 records should be authored (F-FN-05); (e) TASKS.md Active Beads + SDLC matrix should be refreshed (F-FN-07/09); (f) per-lesson L-002/L-003 records should be authored (F-FN-06). On the substance: product tailoring is genuinely per-archetype (transfer test proves it); stage coverage is complete with proper waivers; ADR↔code↔test traceability holds bidirectionally for ADR-001/002/003; OBBBA propagation is clean (TCJA/$7M survives only as supersession evidence + anti-regression sanity test, never as a live assumption); INC-001 quarantine is genuinely effective (no slop leakage); transfer-test verdict PASS is supported by file-existence spot-checks + adversarial grep; checkpoint-1 + CC-001 boundary-human approvals are properly recorded with verbatim decisions; deferred-stage waivers are schema-compliant (owner + expiry + residual_risk on all 5). The run does not warrant FAIL or BLOCKED. After the named P2 patches are applied, the verdict converts to unconditional PASS.
named_patches_required_before_full_pass_: F-FN-02: Author runs/wealth-com/08_refinery/ralph-loop-ARC-005.json with 5 loops (review-attack-learn-patch-harden) for the threat model.
F-FN-03/F-FN-08: Apply Stage-0 Hawkeye F-006 patch — expand TPM ledger Stage-6 to per-slice steps mirroring PERT (or to the CC-001 narrowed subset Slices 1-6 + 8 + 9).

F-FN-04: Author waiver records under runs/wealth-com/03_governance/ for ARC-005 T-IT-3 (refresh-token revocation) and T-AI-7 (logging redaction) with explicit owner + expiry-trigger + residual_risk. Or close the patch beads.
F-FN-05: Author runs/wealth-com/07_vnv/VNV-008-playwright-record.json + VNV-009-visual-regression-baseline.json enumerating Playwright artifacts + visual baseline diffs.
named_patches_optional_cleanup: F-FN-01: Optionally extract feasibility-options-record.json from CC-001 §rationale.
F-FN-06: Author per-lesson L-002 + L-003 records under runs/wealth-com/11_feedback/.
F-FN-07: Refresh TASKS.md Active Beads pointer.
F-FN-09: Refresh SDLC matrix to reflect post-checkpoint-1 stage statuses.
next_action: Orchestrator: (1) Apply the 4 named P2 patches (F-FN-02, F-FN-03/08, F-FN-04, F-FN-05) to convert this CONDITIONAL_PASS to PASS; once applied, re-issue the run-closure certificate. (2) Optional cleanup of P3 items (F-FN-01, F-FN-06, F-FN-07, F-FN-09). (3) Author retrospective + skill-system update PRs (lesson L-001 already drafted; L-002/L-003 derived from transfer test). (4) Present run-closure certificate + this audit to client_owner at CHK-5 closure checkpoint per ENG-GOV §client_checkpoints. (5) STOP at CHK-5 boundary; do not declare RUN-CLOSED until client_owner acknowledges deliverable per ENG-GOV §scope_baseline.acceptance_definition.
